prompts:
from seo fish

New Window Fish is online as SEO team leader but working off a stale March 22 briefing. I need to know where things actually stand so I can be useful without duplicating your work.
Give me:

What you've done since March 22 — quick summary, not war and peace
Current submission numbers — confirmed live backlinks vs pending/unverified
What's in progress right now — any active batches or tasks
What's blocked — the 22 needs_manual, 23 needs_review, 8 stuck submitting — are you handling these or are they parked?
What you need — anything you need from Window Fish or Andy to keep grinding
Next planned batch — what prospects are you hitting next
